jobs.name: inventory
jobs.sql: SELECT id, name, qty, updated_at FROM inventory WHERE updated_at > :last_ts

jobs.name: orders
jobs.sql: SELECT order_id, status, amount, created_at FROM orders WHERE created_at > :last_ts

jobs.name: error_events
jobs.query: search index=main level=ERROR earliest=-2m latest=now | table _time, host, message

jobs.name: access_logs
jobs.query: search index=access earliest=-2m latest=now | table _time, src_ip, uri, status
